overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist climbing from a canal and walking through a historic Middle Eastern city at dusk. The character traverses waterfront promenades, covered walkways, merchant areas, and narrow streets illuminated by fire braziers, encountering pedestrians and a camel rider in an atmospheric blue-hour setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock with stone retaining walls

events.description: character climbs from wooden dock up stone wall to street level

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the canal onto a wooden dock and scaling a stone wall to reach the street

entered.detail: dark water surrounding the wooden dock platform
weathered wooden planks forming a small platform at water level
tall mud brick and stone wall separating the water from the upper street
metal fire basket burning brightly on the upper ledge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character in the water, climbing onto a wooden dock at the edge of a canal. The environment is enclosed by high stone walls. The character then scales the wall to emerge at street level where a burning brazier provides warm light against the blue dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with palm trees and fire braziers

events.description: emerges from enclosed dock area onto open waterfront promenade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront path passing lit braziers and palm trees

notable_agents.action: robed pedestrian walking toward the camera along the path

entered.detail: light-colored stone tiles forming the walkway surface
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dark blue sky
traditional Middle Eastern architecture with arched windows
decorative carved stone barrier along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open waterfront promenade paved with stone tiles. Palm trees line the left side while a stone railing separates the path from the canal on the right. Warm light from braziers illuminates the scene as the character passes pedestrians in traditional robes.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under fabric canopy along the canal

events.description: enters shaded area under fabric canopy, reducing direct sky light

agents.ego_description: walking under the fabric canopy, passing other pedestrians on the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: two robed figures standing and conversing near the railing

entered.detail: large dark green fabric awning stretched between poles providing shade
wooden lattice screen on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a large fabric canopy that stretches over the waterfront path, creating a sheltered corridor. The lighting becomes softer and more diffused under the awning. The stone railing continues along the water as the character passes pedestrians conversing by the canal.

scene_state.functional_zone: merchant shop front with illuminated display

events.description: approaches merchant shop with lit interior, crowd density increases

agents.ego_description: walking past the merchant shop, observing the goods on display and the gathered crowd

notable_agents.action: group of robed customers gathered at the shop entrance examining merchandise

entered.detail: open-fronted shop with warm interior lighting displaying pottery and goods
large dark wooden door with metal studs next to the shop
wooden trellis with climbing plants beside the shop entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a merchant shop with an open front and warm interior lighting that contrasts with the blue dusk outside. Several NPCs gather at the shop browsing goods. The scene transitions from the waterfront to a more commercial street with detailed mud brick architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow residential street with abandoned cart

events.description: turns into narrow alleyway leaving the shop district, lighting becomes darker

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow street, passing by a large wooden cart and scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing against the building wall observing the street

entered.detail: confined dirt path between high mud brick walls
large abandoned wooden wagon with covered cargo parked against the wall
leafless tree silhouetted against the sky at the alley's end

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrow, dimly lit alleyway with dirt ground and high mud brick walls on both sides. A large abandoned wooden cart sits on the left. The atmosphere becomes more confined and darker as the character progresses toward an open area visible at the end of the alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with camel traffic and multiple paths

events.description: camel with rider crosses the path from right to left in front of the character

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, navigating around the camel and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: camel with rider crossing the plaza from right to left

entered.detail: wide open dirt area with multiple building facades and pathways converging
large camel with saddle and rider moving through the square
large arched entrance to a building with decorative blue tile trim

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow alley into a wide open plaza with multiple paths converging. A camel with a rider crosses the scene from right to left. The area features mud brick buildings with decorative archways and blue tile accents, illuminated by scattered braziers as night approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the secluded depths of a canal into the bustling, open plazas of a historic city at dusk. It begins with the character climbing from the water onto a wooden dock and scaling a high stone wall to reach a street illuminated by a burning brazier. As the character moves forward, the scene opens onto a stone waterfront promenade lined with palm trees and pedestrians, before shifting into a sheltered corridor beneath a large fabric canopy. The path then leads past a warmly lit merchant shop and transitions from the waterfront into a confined, dimly lit alleyway featuring mud brick walls and an abandoned wooden cart. Finally, the camera emerges from the narrow passage into a wide open plaza where a camel rider crosses a landscape of decorative archways and blue tile accents under the deepening night sky.
